items.title: Haaland has advantage over Man City team-mates
items.summary: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Micah Richards, Wayne Rooney and Cesar Azpilicueta look ahead to England's match against Norway and feel that Erling Haaland will have an advantage over his Manchester City team-mates in the match.

items.title: Is it time to give record-breaker Pickford the credit he deserves?
items.summary: Is it time to finally give England keeper Jordan Pickford the credit he deserves as he enters the World Cup history books, asks chief football writer Phil McNulty.

items.title: Weekend betting column: SunSport picks for a crucial weekend including Norway vs England
items.summary: WHAT we don’t want to hear tonight is “Lord Nelson, Lord Beaverbrook, Sir Winston Churchill, Sir Anthony Eden, Clement Atlee, Henry Cooper, Lady Diana. Maggie Thatcher. Can you hear me? We have a message for you… your boys took a hell of a beating." Despite the worst rubbing in of a defeat by a foot

items.title: Former Man Utd star Javier Hernandez issues statement about ‘rude’ journalist after World Cup bust-up
items.summary: FORMER Manchester United striker Javier Hernandez has denied aiming comments at Argentina after a World Cup confrontation with a journalist. The Mexican icon, better known as Chicharito, took to social media to insist he was referring to a single “rude” reporter rather than Argentinians as a whole.

items.title: Artificial turf & coaching revolution - how Norway shaped golden generation
items.summary: Artificial turf, investment from gambling and a coaching revolution based on collaboration over egos help Norway build a golden generation of players.

items.title: England set for open-air Miami heat - but do Norway hold the edge?
items.summary: England will head into unknown territory at this World Cup when they face Norway in Miami - playing in searing temperatures.

items.title: All the goals from England's 2026 World Cup campaign so far
items.summary: As England gear up to face Norway at the Miami Stadium for the World Cup quarter-finals, re-live all the goals that got Thomas Tuchel's side there.

items.title: When the World Cup finishes, the football continues on BBC Sport
items.summary: When the World Cup ends we'll still have loads of great content every day as we build up to the new football season.
